content.text:
[cron:d229b99b-1578-4555-a1b0-207795fb5307 TJB NewLead 24h Escalation Check] Run a Truth J Blue GHL escalation check for location TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn using env token GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN_TJB. Steps: (1) fetch Agentic AI Suite Pipeline opportunities and identify any still in stage 691672ae-ed9c-41c5-b708-39689acf3faf for >=24h based on lastStageChangeAt. (2) For each matching opportunity, tag related contact with needs-followup-24h and manual-task-required. (3) For task creation, do NOT probe generic task endpoints. Use ONLY GET /contacts/{contactId}/tasks?locationId=TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn&limit=100 to inspect existing tasks and POST /contacts/{contactId}/tasks to create a new task when no matching open task exists. Normalize task lists from tasks, data.tasks, or data arrays; compare both title and name fields after normalizing punctuation/whitespace; treat a task as open unless completed=true or status is completed/done/closed; and reuse an existing task when the normalized title/name starts with TJB 24h New Lead Follow-up or the normalized body already contains the same follow-up text. Use payload {title, body, dueDate, completed:false} and title prefix TJB 24h New Lead Follow-up. Count both tasks created and tasks already open. (4) Send an announce-style summary with counts and contact names so this reads like a reminder alert.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 18:29 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-21 23:29 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
